title: File Suggestion Improvements
description: Improvements to the file suggestions feature in the chat input area.

features.title: Trigger and Positioning
features.description: Make the file suggestions get added on `enter` not space. Make them always appear above the input box - sometimes they get shoved to the right and the file paths cannot be seen.

features.title: Folder Support and Icons
features.description: Make the file suggestions also work for folders - we should add an icon at the left of all files that will indicate the extension (.ts,.tsx or .py files for code in their language). Create a similar file to @src/renderer/src/screens/projects/codeInfoIcons.tsx for file extension icons that can be used here and in the future.

features.title: Inline Custom Render
features.description: Make the file suggestions render within the input box in a custom way, similarly to how we have it in the StoryCreate Modal.

features.title: Interactive Render Elements
features.description: The custom render needs to have a small X to the right of it to get rid off a file and when hovering over it (when it's added), it should show the file preview card above. If the user backspaces into a custom render of this `@file` it should not delete any characters, but enter the add mode as if the user just started typing the whole `@file` and was at the end but hasn't confirmed yet.

features.title: Copy/Paste Support
features.description: When copying text with this custom rendered file suggestion (anywhere), it must copy the exact file path + `@`, so that when the user pastes this content into the chat input, the custom rendering can be recreated (this must be checked also).
